name: sw-em24
description: COR24 emulator (cor24-run) with built-in assembler. Serves as the vendored cross-assembler for sw-as24 during bootstrap, until the self-hosted assembler can assemble its own source.
notes: Upstream sibling sw-cor24-emulator was not present in this worktree (dcasm) at the time this manifest was landed, so the commit SHA is pinned as TBD. Step 004 (vendor-fetch-script) resolves the sibling path and surfaces a clear error when it is missing; once a populated sibling exists, bump this file's commit / sha256 / recorded_at fields and re-run `just vendor-fetch`.
